ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tumor_samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tumor sample */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient from whom the sample was taken */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "tumor_type" TEXT /* Type of tumor (e.g., lung cancer, breast cancer) */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status of the patient (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "clinical_outcome" TEXT /* Clinical outcome of the patient (e.g., stable, progressed, deceased) */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_storage_condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored (e.g., frozen, formalin-fixed) */,
  "biopsy_type" TEXT /* Type of biopsy (e.g., core needle, surgical) */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_compositions" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tumor sample */,
  "b_cells" REAL /* Proportion of B cells in the sample */,
  "cafs" REAL /* Proportion of Cancer-Associated Fibroblasts (CAFs) in the sample */,
  "cd4_t_cells" REAL /* Proportion of CD4 T cells in the sample */,
  "cd8_t_cells" REAL /* Proportion of CD8 T cells in the sample */,
  "endothelial" REAL /* Proportion of Endothelial cells in the sample */,
  "macrophages" REAL /* Proportion of Macrophages in the sample */,
  "nk_cells" REAL /* Proportion of Natural Killer (NK) cells in the sample */,
  "other_cells" REAL /* Proportion of other cell types in the sample */,
  "total_cell_count" TEXT /* Total number of cells in the sample */,
  "cell_density" REAL /* Density of cells in the sample */,
  "cell_viability" REAL /* Viability percentage of the cells */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient, including previous treatments and conditions */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status (e.g., occasional, regular) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of cancer or other relevant conditions */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemotherapy, radiation therapy) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the treatment, including dosage and side effects */,
  "treatment_dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "treatment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Side effects experienced by the patient */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each clinical outcome */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the clinical outcome assessment */,
  "survival_status" TEXT /* Survival status of the patient (e.g., alive, deceased) */,
  "response_to_treatment" TEXT /* Response to treatment (e.g., stable, progressed, partial response) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "tumor_size" REAL /* Size of the tumor (e.g., in mm) */,
  "metastasis_status" TEXT /* Metastasis status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the tumor sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES tumor_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the tumor sample being annotated */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user adding the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., text, image) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES tumor_samples ("sample_id")
)
